category_sources: Official diffoscope homepage describes the same recursive comparison and supported formats.
source_facts.description says it performs in-depth comparison of files, archives, and directories.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides overview, examples, features, installation pointers, and contribution links; no separate docs path was identified.
repo_sources: Official diffoscope homepage Contribute section links to the Salsa Debian Git repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists command-line interface, text/HTML output, and broad file/archive support.
source_facts.description covers files, archives, and directories.
